query: SELECT id, trade_name, scientific_name, form, price FROM drug_lens WHERE scientific_name LIKE '%PARACETAMOL%' AND form LIKE '%Tablet%' ORDER BY trade_name LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT id, trade_name, scientific_name, form, price FROM drug_lens WHERE scientific_name LIKE '%PARACETAMOL%' AND form LIKE '%Tablet%' ORDER BY trade_name LIMIT 10;

rows.trade_name: FEVADOL COLD & FLU TABLETS 500/30/2 mg Tablet
